response.overview: In a forgotten virtual world, people live in fear of “Bugs” that are eroding all forms of existence.  Wandering through this fragile world, a young girl encounters a traveler carrying the only gun capable of resisting the Bugs.  Through their struggle against the bugs, the characters continue to search for their reason for being.  And as the end of the world draws near, the girl comes across a single "prayer".  This is the story of beings who, despite bearing the fate of eventual fading, continued to seek the meaning of life.
response.title: Dust of the Simulacrum
